title: Lost Backpack 丢了书包
scene: Mike放学后发现书包不见了，到处寻找。

lines.en: Teacher, I cannot find my backpack!
lines.zh: 老师，我找不到我的书包了！

lines.en: When did you last see it?
lines.zh: 你最后一次看到它是什么时候？

lines.en: I left it in the classroom after school.
lines.zh: 放学后我把它留在教室了。

lines.en: Let us go back to the classroom and look.
It is not here. Maybe someone took it by mistake.
lines.zh: 不在这里。也许有人拿错了。
你的书包是什么颜色的？

lines.en: It is blue with a dinosaur on it.
lines.zh: 蓝色的，上面有恐龙图案。

lines.en: Let me ask the other teachers. Do not worry.
lines.zh: 我去问问其他老师。别担心。

lines.en: My homework is inside. I hope someone finds it.
lines.zh: 我的作业在里面。希望能有人找到。

lines.en: I found it! Someone turned it in at the office.
lines.zh: 找到了！有人把它交到了办公室。
